title: Hantavirus Case Confirmed As Evacuated American Passenger Tests Positive, Another French Passenger Falls Ill
summary_full: Passengers evacuated from the hantavirus-hit cruise ship began flying home aboard military and government planes Sunday after the vessel anchored in the Canary Islands.
summary_public: Passengers evacuated from the hantavirus-hit cruise ship began flying home aboard military and government planes Sunday after the vessel anchored in the Canary Islands.
